folder_name.description: S3 remote folder (prefix) for uploaded forecast JSON

output_name.description: Local and remote filename for the forecast JSON artifact

lat.description: Latitude coordinate for OpenWeather forecast request

lon.description: Longitude coordinate for OpenWeather forecast request

s3_outputs.description: OpenWeather 5-day / 3-hour forecast JSON uploaded with faasr_put_file

preconditions: Secret OPENWEATHER_API_KEY is available at runtime via faasr_secret.
postconditions: A JSON file named output_name is written locally then uploaded to folder_name/output_name in the configured data store.
methodology: HTTP GET to OpenWeather 2.5 forecast API using lat, lon, and API key; response saved and uploaded with FaaSr S3 API.
